# Bibliography and Source Corpus

This appendix is generated from `sources/source_inventory.json` and current chapter assignments in `book_structure.json`.

It is a working bibliography for the supplied ASI Stack source corpus. It is not a claim that every source has been ingested, summarized, citation-normalized, or independently verified. Source-derived claims should not be promoted until the relevant source has a source note and Appendix C has been updated.

## Primary ASI Stack Source Corpus

| Source ID | Title | Priority | Layer | Link | Current use | Bibliographic status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `viea` | Verified Intent-to-Execution Architecture | `must_use` | `whole_stack_execution_spine` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1SDu8MWw4dOpFqwLqA8vpE1rV98O2_GeJgVlgb6R9GsM) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); governance-and-stable-capability-fields (Governance and Stable Capability Fields); planning-and-control (Planning and Control); virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory); labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS); reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `scf` | Stable Capability Fields | `must_use` | `governance_recursive_self_improvement` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hQ9LqEgpeHo2SAntUVk15Eegms_xRVfOhtndVM5TDS4) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); governance-and-stable-capability-fields (Governance and Stable Capability Fields); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `planforge` | PlanForge | `must_use` | `planning_control` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12mSs7u6JxrtVQ_GbNpBY7lXCA5uyE62Lx91gi_VRjgo) | planning-and-control (Planning and Control); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `planforge_compiler_arch` | PlanForge: A Compiler Architecture for AI Task Orchestration | `must_use_variant` | `planning_control` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ute1JJLsMfQyRFgKKveSr8U-w_MM-hk5fGxm7Vp5z1o) | planning-and-control (Planning and Control) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `cognitive_compilation` | Cognitive Compilation | `must_use` | `planning_semantic_ir` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1spEWiRnk1NUFuK3BLh3X80r_Up_SyebO1c3JSEzTUis) | planning-and-control (Planning and Control); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `talos` | Talos Protocol | `must_use` | `labor_execution_os` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IRHwojXgcGx4INJsVx8uMYu4vJGl6H5O9w_l_01VcyU) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); governance-and-stable-capability-fields (Governance and Stable Capability Fields); labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `talos_md` | Talos_Protocol_v1.0.md | `must_use_variant` | `labor_execution_os` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vCXRSKiE2C5ngmo7KHhPBBTtzVvr2ki-) | labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `vcm_public` | Virtual_Context_Memory_v1 | `must_use` | `memory_context` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fid_RDNJcY3gM5WfqTpz5RABpzzoehWU4QKGhurRyJM) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `vcm_editable` | Virtual_Context_Memory_v1.0_Editable | `must_use_variant` | `memory_context` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D5RifUx-1Eq_WluCrS9FUcf3qt4X7I6_n21YD2ffB0w) | virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `spinoza` | Proof of Belief / The Spinoza Architecture | `must_use` | `reasoning_epistemology` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Y90DBgxsOJImMXi4aOrwxtbyjlkVZpCzu1YJy_SFatk) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `spinoza_composer` | Spinoza Composer / Spinoza Trinity | `supporting` | `reasoning_media_compliance` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pWHPNCFL5dnphZxKUhj5c_yk3juskWQZPTzPjxE7nEE) | labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS); reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `moecot` | MoECOT-Agent Architecture Whitepaper | `must_use` | `implementation_reference` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Lw5qjIFLK1gxGxqYw3_zLneFF5JT_Ihn5VI1CntjtvM) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); governance-and-stable-capability-fields (Governance and Stable Capability Fields); planning-and-control (Planning and Control); virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory); labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS); routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `moecot_md` | moecot_agent_whitepaper.md | `must_use_variant` | `implementation_reference` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1F0KW0-TR54xKGeetIPkDTV1Tn5_9w3i0) | routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `octopus_router` | Octopus Router Architecture | `must_use` | `routing_modular_intelligence` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Ew0fdnJf9crnGrQDckzNEc5fFniZviayqQfGIR3TBMY) | routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `rmi` | Ratcheting Modular Intelligence | `must_use` | `capability_ratchet` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16ULc3Y82TuqkFGBpjKyhrEVZYt9_Vlvatq2kiO-q1VI) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `cognitive_loop_closure` | Cognitive Loop Closure | `must_use` | `procedural_memory` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12yac3ZpHv3dRk2-0u627rn-gFkqGQWY4jsIJwAW9YeQ) | labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS); routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `benchmaxxing` | Benchmaxxing: The Performance Ratchet | `must_use` | `benchmarks_evidence` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1m1EycQk56VDh1Rg3IY8GYwkebIVn3bGAWIHs93a3628) | routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `cgs` | Compact Generative Systems | `must_use` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1y8IW-rnDSM8-q1KUnLfqKTGobwCoHoBwuMJ4-gCcw3M) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `rgs` | Ratcheting Generative Systems | `supporting` | `compression_capability_growth` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jxbgwiBzgUgdTjpPiOkEQNZz2ehcDioTG-lUBV-f4FA) | routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `rankfold_neuralfold` | RankFold + NeuralFold | `must_use` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-9wujZDobutPQbAml3H3QqYvdt9GIk55bxJiaPeSUhg) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `rankfold_compressor` | rankFold compressor | `must_use_variant` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/11jw0DAAuUvw75Q_1AiwTiUGcd-y_IywB9qdEka9_MfI) | compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `bbvca_v9` | BBVCA_v9_final_public_release | `must_use` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dCcqTteePCyUb66H3qJ-50uYMNDdqHFG7-qQpHSvVaA) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `bbvca_main` | Big Bang Volumetric Compression Architecture | `must_use_variant` | `compression_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1tlgJismt6JaYv_jaf2XbwCX7WEqj9FJ0WvEtbHYS_-E) | compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `genesiscode` | GenesisCode | `must_use` | `executable_specification` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1w4gKcF9a7oV6hsUECsWeEafblvc78ZusxaxdUTfLR2M) | labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS); mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `alignment_field` | Field of God / Alignment Field family | `must_use` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1CCiBBlOEGB2huRDSwGm4P1JkVBkfmaUxJt9AwG23Kzw) | alignment-and-constitution (Alignment and Constitution); integrated-reference-architecture (Integrated Reference Architecture) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `field_of_god` | The Field of God | `must_use_variant` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BDVLQqIeDm-PFijrg6oKaCbRtUyY--_waw88tnU9tj0) | failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); alignment-and-constitution (Alignment and Constitution) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `ethica_mechanica` | Ethica Mechanica | `must_use_variant` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/15cN9D6s2bvAPoitp6Imh7deE3gCebqG4RbaSRGRd5GA) | alignment-and-constitution (Alignment and Constitution) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `eternal_code` | The Eternal Code / unified God, reality, conscious, alignment | `must_use_variant` | `alignment_constitution` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ZMqR7CMSnzignSbHdm38q9jSAXGMRsIoz3jOz3qmVrc) | alignment-and-constitution (Alignment and Constitution) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `coherence_exchange` | The Coherence Exchange | `strong_support` | `epistemic_market_synthesis` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1RUeBKp_UnRVIMc2oPBT2j3xm-HBa81Y4VqTckPhCeJc) | alignment-and-constitution (Alignment and Constitution); reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `verification_bandwidth` | Verification Bandwidth in Bounded Contexts | `strong_support` | `context_verification_theory` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1T34n1Ya6_joaAD8ZxygOpiEuNzEVj3G8_nf0xZuFL2U) | virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory); reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `beastbrain` | BeastBrain Cognitive Architecture | `supporting_lineage` | `whole_stack_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PVLtICJVZm36c6M2y9JkuMZF9nfu_6pyR1SXqFzknME) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); routing-and-modular-intelligence (Routing and Modular Intelligence); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `beastbrain_timeless` | BeastBrain Architecture: Timeless Edition | `supporting_lineage` | `whole_stack_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12g8s3R_v0mJ7GXaOoWeWkqHWBQWe_iGmcTmUwChZLwg) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `aletheia` | Aletheia Foundry | `supporting_lineage` | `safe_general_intelligence_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1H6M_IPbuu86FOQurv2rLQ97EYQVdThZ2U7njl0DBpIE) | asi-is-a-stack-not-a-model (ASI Is a Stack, Not a Model); the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `context_engineer` | Context Engineer / Manhattan Protocol | `supporting_lineage` | `memory_context_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xXP364s9IZ4DFmRHTmBELviRQkJcQ55McIUokioRFdo) | virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `black_hole_context_manager` | Black Hole Context Manager | `supporting_lineage` | `memory_context_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/14KPQT5d86HaFZzQdUr_Sn5p7-8cscSqIZm5zxkijl-I) | virtual-context-memory (Virtual Context Memory) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `ladon_manhattan` | Ladon & The Manhattan Protocol | `supporting_lineage` | `security_governance` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1uT9iQ7Jb2TsU9DletvtVeLEej63aIQl3WS3jTsMgtSM) | governance-and-stable-capability-fields (Governance and Stable Capability Fields); labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `uat` | Unified Adaptive Tribunal | `supporting_lineage` | `evaluation_refinement` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1R7wKo2qg5waosEa-SwC-JKF77qoDiiEp1Df4Gbap0VE) | reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology); evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `treellm` | TreeLLM | `supporting_lineage` | `semantic_representation` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/17C98P4WhU4srqrT83xXpopRvwHO19zRFJ_ov0MWhgHE) | reasoning-verification-and-epistemology (Reasoning, Verification, and Epistemology); compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `software_magic_grimoire` | Software Magic Grimoire | `supporting_lineage` | `command_contracts_promptcraft` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1UjGadqJ3ZiqfLgbac0APtV_OLnlSZAkIW0o0r37YdBo) | planning-and-control (Planning and Control); labor-and-execution-os (Labor and Execution OS) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `road_to_agi` | Road To AGI | `supporting_lineage` | `strategic_roadmap` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1FfYjqa36tMQ4s4KLbPPnIOZNfQefuT7p) | evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets); prototype-roadmap (Prototype Roadmap); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `simulation_scaling` | Simulation Scaling Law | `optional_support` | `compute_fidelity_constraints` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1rt0lnpwZ9X6M_ejLC7PYHQSXsvajYICGo4ETS-ndUFA) | the-efficient-asi-hypothesis (The Efficient ASI Hypothesis); failure-modes-of-ungoverned-intelligence (Failure Modes of Ungoverned Intelligence); compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `tokenmana` | TokenMana | `optional_support` | `resource_economics` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1dGOlGPZi6byTwRUbHQt40OSErBnQ4j6G_BZvA-oJRM8) | evidence-benchmarks-and-ratchets (Evidence, Benchmarks, and Ratchets) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `coilmoecot` | CoilMoECOT Whitepaper v2.0 | `optional_technical_appendix` | `mathematical_search_substrate` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iwhhRGr7vj_Sr4UwwM_yX_ESSyisoWur) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `temporal_coil_research` | Temporal Coil Research | `optional_technical_appendix` | `mathematical_search_substrate` | [source](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PSQsAwMurlVRdsM6r_zRd2MPLZYv0qXH) | mathematical-and-search-substrates (Mathematical and Search Substrates) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |
| `bugbrain` | BugBrain | `optional_support` | `edge_efficiency_lineage` | [source](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1XR716XCo-WmvOpvGTGDmh9zbv44oiyjfcVDVQ1YibIc) | compression-and-representation (Compression and Representation); living-book-methodology (Living Book Methodology) | inventory-recorded; not yet citation-normalized |

## External Literature Queue

Third-party references should be added only when bibliographic metadata is recorded and the source is actually used.

| Area | Expected role | Status |
|---|---|---|
| AI alignment and corrigibility | External comparison for the alignment and constitution layer. | queued; no citation recorded |
| AI governance, evals, and deployment policy | External comparison for authority ceilings, readiness gates, and release governance. | queued; no citation recorded |
| Planning, task decomposition, and agent control | External comparison for PlanForge-style planning/control. | queued; no citation recorded |
| Retrieval, memory, and context engineering | External comparison for VCM and context-packet discipline. | queued; no citation recorded |
| Formal methods, verification, and proof assistants | External comparison for claim ledgers, Lean proofs, and protocol invariants. | queued; no citation recorded |
| Modular systems, routing, and mixture-of-experts | External comparison for routing and specialist promotion. | queued; no citation recorded |
| Compression, representation learning, and program synthesis | External comparison for compact generative systems and residual accounting. | queued; no citation recorded |
| Benchmarks, evaluation science, and anti-Goodhart methods | External comparison for evidence ratchets and regression preservation. | queued; no citation recorded |

## Citation Policy

- Use stable source IDs for supplied corpus references until full citation metadata exists.
- Do not infer authors, dates, venues, versions, or publication status from titles alone.
- Do not cite a source as supporting a claim until its text has been ingested and a source note exists.
- Keep speculative or design-synthesis claims labeled as `argument` until source, prototype, or test evidence justifies promotion.
